common_side_products.name: unreacted starting acid
common_side_products.note: Peak at 10-12 ppm persists

common_side_products.name: anhydride
common_side_products.note: Two carbonyl peaks in 13C ~166/170 ppm

common_side_products.name: ester hydrolysis product
common_side_products.note: Acid OH reappears on workup

common_side_products.name: HOBt/HOAt byproduct
common_side_products.note: Aromatic peaks ~7-8 ppm from coupling reagent

common_side_products.name: urea (from DCC)
common_side_products.note: DCU precipitate, usually filtered

common_side_products.name: epimerization
common_side_products.note: Diastereomer signals if chiral center alpha to carbonyl

common_side_products.name: double Boc protection
common_side_products.note: Two tBu singlets if N-H attacked twice

common_side_products.name: unreacted amine
common_side_products.note: NH2 signal persists

common_side_products.name: incomplete deprotection
common_side_products.note: Residual t-Bu singlet at 1.45 ppm

common_side_products.name: TFA salt
common_side_products.note: Broad NH3+ at 8-9 ppm (normal product as TFA salt)

common_side_products.name: protodeboronation
common_side_products.note: Boronic acid converted to ArH, but no new biaryl bond

common_side_products.name: homocoupling
common_side_products.note: Symmetrical biaryl from Pd-mediated ArB(OH)2 + ArB(OH)2

common_side_products.name: unreacted halide
common_side_products.note: Starting aryl halide peaks persist

reaction_types.name: Reductive Amination
diagnostic_gained: NCH or NCH2 adjacent to N

common_side_products.name: over-reduction of imine to amine
common_side_products.note: Expected if NaBH4 in excess — usually desired

common_side_products.name: double alkylation
common_side_products.note: N-dialkylated product if excess aldehyde

common_side_products.name: alcohol (over-reduction)
common_side_products.note: Aldehyde reduced to alcohol without imine formation

common_side_products.name: 1,2 vs 1,4 addition mixture
common_side_products.note: Both alcohol and enol ether signals for alpha,beta-unsaturated

common_side_products.name: elimination product
common_side_products.note: Alkene signals appear on workup

common_side_products.name: over-oxidation to carboxylic acid
common_side_products.note: Acid OH peak 10-12 ppm, especially from primary alcohols with harsh oxidant

common_side_products.name: incomplete reaction
common_side_products.note: Starting alcohol CHOH peak persists

common_side_products.name: E/Z mixture
common_side_products.note: Two sets of vinyl proton signals

common_side_products.name: betaine decomposition product
common_side_products.note: Phosphine oxide byproduct Ph3P=O at ~1.5 ppm in 31P NMR

common_side_products.name: incomplete deprotection
common_side_products.note: Residual CH2Ph singlet at ~5.1 ppm

common_side_products.name: over-reduction
common_side_products.note: Alkene or arene rings reduced if over-exposed to H2
